## Evidence

This repo runs on evidence. Please attach the concrete artifacts, not just a description:

- Command you ran (e.g. `bash scripts/verify.sh`) and its full output / exit code.
- Relevant log lines or the path under `roadmap/evidence/F-XXXX/` if applicable.
- Screenshots for any UI behavior.
